task.title: #40 扩展 workflow-state:completed closeout 提示，覆盖 PR body、dry-run 与 metadata tail

index.problem: Issue #40 要求复查 `[workflow-state:completed]` 的提示是否仍不足，并判断原方案是否因近期大量 PR 合并而过时。当前主干已经在 Phase 3.6/3.7、`trellis-finish-work` skill / prompt / command overlay、README 和 companion script 中补齐了 PR body、dry-run、metadata-only tail 与 direct publish 限制。但 canonical workflow 和 dogfood active workflow 的 `[workflow-state:completed]` 仍然只有一句：
index.outcome: 扩展 `trellis/workflows/guru-team/workflow.md` 中的 `[workflow-state:completed]` closeout breadcrumb，使它覆盖 Branch Review Gate stale fallback、PR body/readiness、finish-work dry-run、metada
changed_behavior: 扩展 `trellis/workflows/guru-team/workflow.md` 中的 `[workflow-state:completed]` closeout breadcrumb，使它覆盖 Branch Review Gate stale fallback、PR body/readiness、finish-work dry-run、metada
同步 dogfood 运行副本 `.trellis/workflow.md`，保证当前仓库运行时读取到的 completed breadcrumb 与 canonical workflow 一致。
为 `.codex/hooks/test_inject_workflow_state.py` 增加 completed breadcrumb 回归测试，验证 hook parser 会从 workflow Markdown 注入新的 closeout 关键文案。

index.retrieval_text:
#40 扩展 workflow-state:completed closeout 提示，覆盖 PR body、dry-run 与 metadata tail
Issue #40 要求复查 `[workflow-state:completed]` 的提示是否仍不足，并判断原方案是否因近期大量 PR 合并而过时。当前主干已经在 Phase 3.6/3.7、`trellis-finish-work` skill / prompt / command overlay、README 和 companion script 中补齐了 PR body、dry-run、metadata-only tail 与 direct publish 限制。但 canonical workflow 和 dogfood active workflow 的 `[workflow-state:completed]` 仍然只有一句：
扩展 `trellis/workflows/guru-team/workflow.md` 中的 `[workflow-state:completed]` closeout breadcrumb，使它覆盖 Branch Review Gate stale fallback、PR body/readiness、finish-work dry-run、metada
扩展 `trellis/workflows/guru-team/workflow.md` 中的 `[workflow-state:completed]` closeout breadcrumb，使它覆盖 Branch Review Gate stale fallback、PR body/readiness、finish-work dry-run、metada
同步 dogfood 运行副本 `.trellis/workflow.md`，保证当前仓库运行时读取到的 completed breadcrumb 与 canonical workflow 一致。
为 `.codex/hooks/test_inject_workflow_state.py` 增加 completed breadcrumb 回归测试，验证 hook parser 会从 workflow Markdown 注入新的 closeout 关键文案。
